name: io.github.Choppaaahh/interline
description: Neutral, non-custodial MCP payment router: discover rails, then pay across them.

environmentVariables.name: APV0_BUYER_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your own wallet private key (0x...). Stays in your env; the server never holds funds. Required only for pay_for_resource, not for discovery.
